questions.question: The speed of an object is calculated by dividing the ______ by the time taken.
questions.explanation: According to the formula, speed = distance / time. This concept was discussed in Section 2.

questions.question: The unit of length is ______ in the SI system.
questions.explanation: In Section 3, it was mentioned that the meter is the standard unit of length in the SI system.

questions.question: A body moving with uniform speed covers ______ distance in equal intervals of time.
questions.explanation: This concept was discussed in Section 4, where it was explained that a body moving with uniform speed covers equal distances in equal intervals of time.

questions.question: The average speed of an object is calculated by dividing the ______ distance by the total time taken.
questions.explanation: According to the formula, average speed = total distance / total time. This concept was discussed in Section 5.

questions.question: The C.G.S unit of speed is ______ m/s.
questions.explanation: In Section 6, it was mentioned that the C.G.S unit of speed is 1 m/s.

questions.question: A car moving in a straight line has ______ motion.
questions.explanation: This concept was discussed in Section 7, where it was explained that a car moving in a straight line has rectilinear motion.

questions.question: The formula for speed is ______ = distance / time.
questions.explanation: According to the formula, speed = distance / time. This concept was discussed in Section 2.

questions.question: A body moving with non-uniform speed covers ______ distance in equal intervals of time.
questions.explanation: This concept was discussed in Section 4, where it was explained that a body moving with non-uniform speed covers unequal distances in equal intervals of time.

questions.question: The average speed of an object is calculated by dividing the ______ distance by the total time taken.
questions.explanation: According to the formula, average speed = total distance / total time. This concept was discussed in Section 5.

questions.question: The unit of length is ______ in the C.G.S system.
questions.explanation: In Section 6, it was mentioned that the centimeter is a unit of length in the C.G.S system.

questions.question: A body moving with uniform speed covers ______ distance in equal intervals of time.
questions.explanation: This concept was discussed in Section 4, where it was explained that a body moving with uniform speed covers equal distances in equal intervals of time.

questions.explanation: In Section 6, it was mentioned that the C.G.S unit of speed is 1 m/s.
